title: Buttery Adventurous Argentinian Cheese Pasta
description: Linguine pasta tossed with coconut cream, cheese, and spicy chorizo, finished with a buttery brown sugar crust.
instructions: Cook linguine pasta according to the package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add sliced chorizo sausage and cook, stirring occasionally, until crispy and golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add coconut cream and stir until smooth and heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
Add gruyère and parmesan cheese to the skillet and stir until melted and smooth.
Add cooked linguine pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the cheese and chorizo mixture.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a serving dish and sprinkle with brown sugar, flaky sea salt, and crushed red pepper flakes.
Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter in a small saucepan over low heat until brown and fragrant.
Pour the brown butter over the pasta mixture and sprinkle with chopped parsley and cilantro (if using).
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
